title: Autosave draft content with debounce (no revision created)
description: Implement the confirmed autosave decision: the editor persists a draft to the `blocks` table automatically after ~2 seconds of typing inactivity, without creating a `revisions` row. Publishing (TASK-34) is the only action that creates a revision.
acceptanceCriteria: Editor content changes trigger a debounced save (default 2s of inactivity) calling `blocks.saveDraft`
`blocks.saveDraft` (protectedProcedure mutation) replaces the tab's `blocks` rows with the current editor state, without touching `revisions`
A visible, unobtrusive save-status indicator shows 'Salvando...' during the debounce/request and 'Salvo' once persisted, without blocking typing
Rapid typing does not trigger a save request per keystroke — only after the debounce window elapses
Navigating away from the tab while an unsaved debounce is pending flushes the save immediately (or warns the user) rather than silently discarding it

steps.details: Add `saveDraft: protectedProcedure.input(z.object({ tabId: z.string(), doc: tiptapDocSchema })).mutation(...)` to `apps/server/src/trpc/routers/blocks.ts`. Inside a transaction, delete existing blocks for `tabId` and insert the new set from `tiptapDocToBlocks(doc, tabId)` (TASK-31).

steps.description: Add debounced save hook in the editor
steps.details: In `ContentEditor.tsx`, use the editor's `onUpdate` callback with a debounce utility (e.g. a custom `useDebouncedCallback` or `lodash.debounce`) set to 2000ms, calling `blocks.saveDraft.mutate({ tabId, doc: editor.getJSON() })`.
Track mutation state (`idle | pending | success | error`) and render a small status label near the toolbar reflecting it, resetting to idle after a couple seconds post-success.

steps.description: Flush pending save on navigation away
steps.details: On route change / component unmount, if a debounced save is still pending, cancel the debounce timer and immediately fire the save mutation (fire-and-forget is acceptable for MVP; a blocking confirm dialog is not required).

Using Playwright: type continuously for under 2s and confirm no save request fires yet; stop typing and confirm exactly one save request fires after ~2s; reload the tab and confirm the draft content persisted.

technicalNotes: This confirms the session's decision: autosave persists a working draft continuously, but only the explicit 'Publicar' action (TASK-34) creates a `revisions` snapshot — keep these two write paths clearly separated in code to avoid accidentally versioning every autosave.
